name: prism
description: Prism Web - AI 驱动的 QA 分身，让 AI 帮你测试企业内部系统

scripts.dev: npm run build:css && NODE_ENV=development node server/index.js
scripts.dev:https: npm run build:css && HTTPS=1 PORT=3443 NODE_ENV=development node server/index.js
scripts.cert:local: mkdir -p certs && openssl req -x509 -newkey rsa:2048 -nodes -sha256 -days 365 -subj '/CN=localhost' -addext 'subjectAltName=DNS:localhost,IP:127.0.0.1' -keyout certs/localhost-key.pem -out certs/localhost-cert.pem
